hero_p: A piece of pure paradise in the village of Gvozdenovic near Ub. We combine tradition, open space, and love for nature.
story_p1: Levak Green Farm was born out of a desire to return to our roots and create a self-sustaining oasis. In the heart of gentle Gvozdenovic, we decided to start something different — a farm where animals and nature live in perfect harmony.
story_p2: Our focus is on healthy living, free-range movement for our animals, and absolutely natural processes without chemicals or compromises.
prod1_p: Our hens spend the whole day on spacious green pastures and in open spaces. They feed completely naturally, which gives our eggs a distinctive bright yellow yolk, rich taste, and premium quality.
prod2_p: There are no cages, industrial feed, or chemicals here. Everything that comes from Levak Green Farm is the fruit of the pure nature of Gvozdenovic, fresh air, and a love for the traditional way of farming.
board_intro: Every week we bring freshness directly from the farm to your doorstep in the Belgrade area.
board_note: *Reservations are accepted up to 24 hours before the delivery date.
location_p1: We are located in the beautiful and ecologically pristine village of Gvozdenovic, Ub municipality.
location_p2: We are surrounded by greenery, forests, and clean air, which gives our products a special touch of health.
contact_lead: Have questions or want to secure your supplies for the next delivery? Write to us or call us directly!
